_comment: Example MCP server entries for ProtoForge. Adapt the commands/args/paths to YOUR install, then merge into your Claude Code MCP configuration. Names matter: ProtoForge expects servers reachable as kipilot, freecad, blender.

kipilot._comment: KiCad PCB control. Install per the KiPilot MCP project; enable KiCad IPC API and restart KiCad.

freecad._comment: neka-nat/freecad-mcp. Addon goes in FreeCAD's Mod dir; start the RPC server inside FreeCAD before use.

blender._comment: ahujasid/blender-mcp. Install the addon, enable it, start its server from the addon panel; keep Blender open.
